description: Tab coloring rules based on SQL queries executed against active connection. No regex matching is used.

queryRules.name: Sysadmin sessions
queryRules.query: SELECT CASE WHEN IS_SRVROLEMEMBER('sysadmin') = 1 THEN 'SA' ELSE 'NON_SA' END;

queryRules.name: Non-sysadmin sessions
queryRules.query: SELECT CASE WHEN IS_SRVROLEMEMBER('sysadmin') = 1 THEN 'SA' ELSE 'NON_SA' END;
